profile.label: Profile
profile.summary: Software engineer with experience building reliable web applications, collaborating across teams, and shipping maintainable product features.

entries.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built customer-facing product features for a SaaS platform used by distributed teams.
Collaborated with designers and backend engineers to deliver responsive, accessible interfaces.
Improved deployment reliability by documenting release steps and tightening API validation.

entries.title: BSc in Computer Science
bullets: Focused on software engineering, distributed systems, and data-intensive applications.
Completed team-based projects covering backend services, frontend applications, and testing workflows.

entries.title: Cyber Intelligence Platform
bullets: Reworked and modernized an existing web application by improving UI components, state management, and overall performance
Implemented new product features and integrated backend APIs with clean error handling, caching, and structured data flows
Improved code quality and maintainability through refactoring, testing, documentation, and reduction of technical debt
Supported full-stack development with backend services, API integrations, monitoring, debugging, and CI/CD release workflows
